绑定助学为乐系统后，左手【笃学不倦时钟】，右手【博闻强记戒尺】，还能给学生加点天赋点。
一年时间，高三十七班全班72人从全校倒数到考入清北，震惊整个国内教育界！
楚江从一个刚毕业的大学生一跃成为教育界的新贵！
“谁不想让自己孩子到楚老师班上去上课？那可是清北啊！”
“楚老师，我小妹长得水灵，改天我介绍您认识一下？对了，我儿子明年高三，您看能不能到您班上学习？”
“楚老师，这张卡里有五百万，感谢您让我儿子考上了北大，它现在是您的了！”
楚江：“使不得，教书育人，职责所在，我只拿我该拿的！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9bd26a59de3f7035024eabdf5c75144f","author":"做我的傻猪","author_id":"","book_id":"7321297915626916926","book_name":"教师：教学十年我的学生都是大佬","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6371人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7321302336431735358","read_count":"6371","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"643568"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"279","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e39951e02ab257fff2f8405316215cea~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779388303&x-signature=aYJrI3a0cLlEEc8Bwx8FjcPal8c%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"923205953922248","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"91"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":14,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":315,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3704,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":4578},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7336978158322778905","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这简直是我看过最爽的书了，没有之一"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1708275291,"group_id":"7321297915626916926","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"d 一年时间，高三十七班全班72人从全校倒数到考入清北，震惊整个国内教育界！
楚江从一个刚毕业的大学生一跃成为教育界的新贵！
“谁不想让自己孩子到楚老师班上去上课？那可是清北啊！”
“楚老师，我小妹长得水灵，改天我介绍您认识一下？对了，我儿子明年高三，您看能不能到您班上学习？”
“楚老师，这张卡里有五百万，感谢您让我儿子考上了北大，它现在是您的了！”
楚江：“使不得，教书育人，职责所在，我只拿我该拿的！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9bd26a59de3f7035024eabdf5c75144f","author":"做我的傻猪","author_id":"","book_id":"7321297915626916926","book_name":"教师：教学十年我的学生都是大佬","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6371人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7321302336431735358","read_count":"6371","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"643568"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"279","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e39951e02ab257fff2f8405316215cea~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779388303&x-signature=aYJrI3a0cLlEEc8Bwx8FjcPal8c%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"923205953922248","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"290"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读19小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":30117,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":68680,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":203},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7332290916954489624","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是我在所有这类书中看到的最好的作者加油"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1707184870,"group_id":"7321297915626916926","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info 750 吧[尬笑][尬笑][尬笑]，这样大纲有点毁了，作者可以适当加点感情戏，可以让小说人物形象更丰满一点，不需要一直强调学生成绩上的提高，读者都能感受到，还有也可以拿些网上的鸡汤树才，现在的鸡汤有点千篇一律的感觉，不过说实话还不错这本书，爽文是挺爽的，但一直爽的话又差一点意思，本人快 2000 小时阅读了，实测这本小说没任何毒点（本人暂未发现），可以支持一下"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1707239360,"group_id":"7321297915626916926","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"看兴趣写喽。。。。。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4eJOCwz6U92Ms+AhAI/bUQMRugxicSZGhVVOZ3SQ3ew","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7aad6a17c7c247788ea6f2c38e3dc108~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787959&x-signature=n1%2BIaPaxk%2FvTAQbV%2Fsu7b%2BJ%2BxHU%3D","user_id":"2752793877419256","user_name":"要做一块海绵"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2752793877419256","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7321297915626916926","book_info":{"abstract":"刚入职的楚江被迫接手了全校倒数第一的高三十七班。
